summary: The user is training for a triathlon in June and sought assistance in creating a workout schedule that includes running, biking, and strength training. They provided details about their fitness goals, availability, and preferences, leading to the development of a personalized training plan that includes adjustments for group rides and longer bike sessions.
facts: The user is training for a triathlon scheduled for June.
The user can dedicate 4-5 days a week to working out.
The user prefers morning workouts between 6:30-8:30 am.
The user wants each workout to last about 45-60 minutes.
The user completed a 5K in 27 minutes and 12 seconds, which was a personal best.
The user participated in a charity 5K run on February 20th, which was their first event of the year.
The user is focusing on core and glutes for strength training on Wednesdays.
The user plans to do a group bike ride with friends on Saturdays.
The user is considering a longer bike ride of 30-40 miles this weekend.
The user has been doing weightlifting and bodyweight exercises for strength training.
The user is incorporating swimming, biking, and running into their training plan.
The user is excited about their training plan and the upcoming longer bike ride.
